items.headline: Anthony Edwards (knee) questionable to return for Game 1 vs. Spurs
items.description: Anthony Edwards (knee) might be back for Game 1 of the Minnesota Timberwolves’ playoff series against the San Antonio Spurs.

items.headline: Recap: Pistons, Cavaliers win in Game 7, will face off in East semis
items.description: The Pistons and Cavaliers advanced to an East semifinals matchup, and the Raptors and Magic ended their season with a Game 7 loss.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Jarrett Allen cleans glass to lead Cavs to Game 7 win
items.description: The Cavaliers pulled away from the Raptors behind a dominant performance from Jarrett Allen, and Cleveland will move on to face the Pistons in the East semis.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Tobias Harris steadies the ship, Paolo Banchero exits on great effort
items.description: Detroit advances to the East semifinals for the first time since 2008, as Orlando heads into an offseason of soul-searching.

items.headline: NBA Playoffs: What to expect in Knicks-76ers series
items.description: Superstar matchups at guard and center highlight classic rivalry as the 76ers take on the Knicks in the East.

items.headline: Starting 5: Sixers take Game 7 in Boston, two more today in Detroit & Cleveland
items.description: Sixers complete 3-1 comeback to defeat Celtics. Pistons, Magic, Cavs & Raptors fates all decided today in two more Game 7s.

items.headline: NBA Playoffs: What to expect in Thunder-Lakers series
items.description: Healthy and injured superstars loom large as the Lakers take on the defending champion Thunder in the West.

items.headline: 3 things to know in Raptors-Cavaliers Game 7
items.description: Performances from a trio of stars and home-court edge could determine which team advances to the East Semifinals.

items.headline: 3 things to know in Magic-Pistons Game 7
items.description: Matching up against Cade Cunningham and help for Paolo Banchero could determine which team closes out the series.

items.headline: Live Updates: Sixers Defeat Celtics in Game 7
items.description: Follow along as we present highlights, updates and live scores for the Celtics-Sixers Game 7

items.headline: Redick hails LeBron’s greatness as injury-hit Lakers oust Rockets in 6
items.description: LeBron James led L.A. to the semifinals despite being without co-star Luka Dončić, and Austin Reaves' limited availability.

items.headline: Jayson Tatum (knee) out against 76ers in Game 7
items.description: Celtics forward Jayson Tatum (left knee stiffness) is sidelined for Boston's win-or-go-home game against Philadelphia.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Tyrese Maxey closes the deal, shots don't fall for Boston and the 76ers advance
items.description: Tyrese Maxey comes up clutch on back-to-back buckets, Joel Embiid leaves it all on the floor & more from Saturday's Game 7.

items.headline: Starting 5: Cade drives historic comeback, RJ gets OT bounce, Sixers-Celtics tonight
items.description: Sixers-Celtics Game 7 today, LeBron & Lakers advance to face Thunder, Pistons rally from down 24 and RJ Barrett sinks wild 3 in OT.

items.headline: Trending Topics: Who will win the Game 7s this weekend?
items.description: With 3 first-round series in the East headed to a decisive game, who will advance in the NBA Playoffs? Our writers chime in.
